title: FirstJoinBonus
description: Gives players a bonus the first time they join the server
body:
![firstjoinbonus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79055bab6d909ec6dc06c68480976837e0b275b4.jpeg)
FirstJoinBonus is a lightweight plugin designed to welcome new players on their first join.
It provides them with a helpful starter kit to begin their journey.
Players receive an diamond axe and 16 pieces of bread.
This ensures they can survive the first steps without struggling for resources.
Perfect for survival servers that want to make the first join more friendly and fun.
